hourlyDaysHelp: For how many days hourly values should be stored (must be ≤ number of days)
iconSetHelp: Which icon set to use for the icon_url datapoint
iconPreviewWmo: Preview: WMO icons (OGC WorldWeatherSymbols, CC BY 4.0)
enableAirQualityHelp: european_aqi, PM10, PM2.5, NO₂, CO, dust, ozone under current.air_quality
enableAstronomyHelp: Sunrise, sunset, moon phase, moonrise, moonset under dayX.astronomy
enableAgricultureHelp: Solar radiation, CAPE, soil temperature, irradiance under *.agriculture (default off)
enablePollenHelp: Pollen data from Air Quality API. Europe only.
widgetHint: Each widget generates an HTML datapoint under location.widget.widgetID. Get IP and port from the web adapter.
enableDwdHelp: Official warnings from Deutscher Wetterdienst. Resolved automatically from location coordinates. Only available for locations in Germany.
warnDwdNeedsEnabled: DWD warnings must first be enabled under 'Optional Data'.
warnLeadHoursHelp: How many hours in advance should the warning be sent?
warnNeedsHourlyInterval: Warnings require at least hourly updates. The interval has been set to 60 minutes.
warnLeadHoursTooHigh: Lead time must not exceed 24 hours
